title: pergularia suaveolens
intro: Pergularia suaveolens, also known as Swargavarti or Indian Pennywort, is a succulent plant native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Pergularia suaveolens include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
